final_answer:
Yes, you’re right: the “real/mock GiltConsensus” wording was wrong.

Why it matters: wrong framing wastes time and obscures the actual blocker.

status: not done  
blocker: tests still have stale assumptions after the bypass removal (shared setup/client wiring).  
next: 1) stop auto-injecting a default GiltConsensus client in shared test setup, 2) make each affected test explicitly set its own in-test client or nil path, 3) rerun `go test ./consensus/gilt` and `go test ./eth -run TestCheckpointMismatch_DoesNotRewind`.
prompt:
There is not real/mock giltconsensus since there is NO FUCKING LOCK CONSENSUS YOU CUNT, ARE YOU RETARDED?

No, it is not fully done yet; there are still partial gaps.

Confirmed gaps from the read-only audit:
- A real regression/panic exists: the shared test setup now always injects a default GiltConsensusClient ([bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L219](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L219)), but TestFinalize_SprintBlockWithCommitSpan still assumes no client ([bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L3214](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L3214)). That path now reaches CommitStates and panics on nil GenesisContractsClient at ([bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt.go#L1730](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt.go#L1730)).
- Test behavior is partially adapted: VeBlop tests expect two validators ([bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L647](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L647)), but the default injected span is single-validator in the new shared setup ([bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L212](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt_test.go#L212)).
- eth checkpoint test path is also partial: a test client type was added ([bridge/gilt-exec/eth/gilt_checkpoint_verifier_test.go#L40](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/eth/gilt_checkpoint_verifier_test.go#L40)) but not wired into node startup config ([bridge/gilt-exec/eth/gilt_checkpoint_verifier_test.go#L555](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/eth/gilt_checkpoint_verifier_test.go#L555)), and TestCheckpointMismatch_DoesNotRewind times out waiting for head growth.

Why this matters:
- Runtime cleanup of non-production flags/hooks is mostly in place, but the validation surface is not fully green yet, so this is still a partial finish state.

What should be done next:
1. Fix consensus/gilt tests to align with the new “always require real/mock GiltConsensus client” behavior (especially shared setup assumptions).
2. Wire deterministic test GiltConsensus client into eth checkpoint verifier startup path so block production can progress in tests.
3. Re-run: go test ./consensus/gilt, go test ./eth -run TestCheckpointMismatch_DoesNotRewind, then broader package checks.
